code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or anger
    - Product is defective, unsafe, completely ineffective, or returned
    - Clear statements such as "terrible," "junk," "don't buy," "returned," "doesn't work"
    - Safety hazards or total failure automatically lean toward 1
    - Multiple unresolved issues reported in same review

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - More negative than positive
    - Significant flaws, poor quality, missing parts, misleading description
    - Some limited usefulness but strong disappointment
    - Language such as "cheap," "useless," "not as pictured," "pain to use"
    - Functional but with major compromises

    3 Stars (Neutral / Mixed):
    - Balanced pros and cons
    - "It's okay," "average," "not great but not terrible"
    - Works but with noticeable limitations
    - Conflicted or moderate tone
    - If sentiment is clearly mixed and neither side dominates, choose 3
    - "Does the job" without enthusiasm

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Mostly positive with minor criticisms
    - Product works well but not perfect
    - Phrases like "pretty good," "above average," "would recommend"
    - Minor complaints that do not override satisfaction
    - Specific praise with one clear drawback mentioned
    - Satisfied but withholding highest praise
    - Mentions specific usage limitations (e.g., "don't overstuff", "requires careful handling")
    - Practical disclaimers indicating functional compromises

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Strong satisfaction and enthusiasm
    - Clear recommendation to others
    - Exceeds expectations in core functionality
    - Phrases like "love it," "perfect," "excellent," "extremely happy," "worth every penny"
    - Transforms user experience through exceptional utility
    - Minor feature gaps outweighed by primary performance excellence
    - Aesthetic appeal combined with flawless functionality
    - Sustained praise across features despite secondary limitations

    EDGE CASE HANDLING:
    - Practical disclaimers indicating functional limitations → 4 (e.g., "requires special care but works")
    - Core functionality excellence + minor drawbacks → 5 (e.g., "lightweight but performs perfectly")
    - Aesthetic praise + functional benefits → 5
    - Mixed updates: Final verdict overrides initial negative impressions
    - Specific use case success with enthusiastic endorsement → 5
    - Temporary satisfaction + long-term doubts → 4
    - Price praise without functional limitations → 5
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: It's not a good vacuum. It's hard to pick up dirt and then it will spit it out so you have to go over and over the same area. I wouldn't buy it again.
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: The blender works, but it's very loud and the buttons are hard to press. I expected better quality for the price.
Rating: 2

Example 3:
Review: These reusable bags are great for snacks, but don't overstuff them or the seal might fail. Overall very handy and eco-friendly.
Rating: 4

Example 4:
Review: This lightweight pan heats evenly and nothing sticks. Perfect for quick meals even though it's not heavy-duty!
Rating: 5

Example 5:
Review: Vibrant blue color exceeded expectations. Transformed my son's room, though the material feels thinner than premium brands.
Rating: 4

Example 6:
Review: So far this blender works perfectly. The glossy red design makes my kitchen look modern. Highly recommend!
Rating: 5

Example 7:
Review: The cushions are okay but the size was wrong. Still using them because they're better than nothing.
Rating: 3

Example 8:
Review: This mattress excels for guest use! Comfortable with amazing features, though not ideal for daily long-term use.
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (36 total misclassified):
  gold 5 -> 4: 18
  gold 4 -> 5: 11
  gold 4 -> 3: 3
  gold 1 -> 2: 1
  gold 3 -> 2: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "With all the mixed opinions on this blanket I had pretty low expectations for it. But I was pleasantly surprised when it arrived to find it soft, nicely made and even having a little weight to it. Here I was expecting some low quality blanket that wo..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "These are great as decorative throws. They are much too rough to be used for anything else. I personally like to curl up on the sofa with a "super soft" throw when reading but there is no way this throw is comfortable enough for that. My friend came ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 2, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "I ended up liking this more than expected. It's not super soft but it looks good with modern yet "homespun" appearance to it. Easy to wash and goes anywhere - great to toss in the back of a sofa or chair, bring along in the car or just leave across t..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "I am a fan of the DII everyday kitchen basics. The oval terry potholders are an essential item in the kitchen. When you are cooking, you will at some point need to pick a pan out of the oven or a pot off the stove and they can both burn you if you do..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "I have only used this once so far, but I really like it. It is easy to operate once you figure out the steam buttons...lol! The scrubber was effective and it cleaned a pretty sticky kitchen floor. Next..on to my tile."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "I love this vacuum and ditto the other lovers reviews. It really does go under almost anything and is very handy.

.UPDATE after 2 yrs of  major problems which were rectified thru customer service I am giving up and moving on."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [3, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "I am not a fan of these disposable bags.  They are super thin plastic, and are very difficult to work with as they are super floppy.  The whole time I was concerned that the bag would burst.

Spend a bit more to get a few good quality frosting bags, ..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "I ordered a package of these in black for my kids and their friends to use as Trick-or-Treat bags this year. Unlike other brands of these reusable grocery bags I've bought, these are a bit more narrow, like traditional paper grocery bags are. I like ..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 36 errors, 14 borderline out of 80 examples."}
